subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-07-05
subcodes.first_line: The Divine Sovereignty is an ancient sovereignty; not an accidental sovereignty.
subcodes.subjects: @the Adamic cycle and the Baha'i cycle, @literal interpretation, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @names and attributes of God, @God's attributes require the existence of objects, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @creation of the world, @infinity and eternity
